direct_update_required_when: adding a governance script, check, test, public Just recipe, workflow artifact, role protocol, phase bundle, topology surface, session/runtime authority surface, or machine-readable governance contract
renaming or relocating a governance surface
retiring a leaf script or compatibility wrapper
changing the owner, phase, side-effect class, debug artifact, or public exposure of a governance surface

leaf_script_sunset_policy.when_touched: replace with canonical bundle, convert to internal helper, or record explicit compatibility justification in this ledger
leaf_script_sunset_policy.removal_gate: must remain represented until replacement bundle is tracked and usable

implementation_plan.title: Script Surface Inventory and Public Entry Contract
implementation_plan.deliverable: deterministic topology ledger projection plus gov-check enforcement

implementation_plan.title: Phase Checkpoint Bundle Runner
implementation_plan.deliverable: gov-check exposes list/dry-run/json/sync topology flags and records bundle substep metadata

implementation_plan.title: Justfile Public Surface Consolidation
implementation_plan.deliverable: all public Just recipes are inventoried and classified for canonical, alias, or baselined leaf handling

implementation_plan.title: Leaf Script Sunset/Compatibility Wrapper Policy
implementation_plan.deliverable: baselined leaves have replacement bundles and must be consolidated or justified when touched

implementation_plan.title: Structured Failure Dossier for Phase Bundles
implementation_plan.deliverable: phase bundle failures append JSONL dossier entries with markdown projection and output artifacts

public_leaf_groups.replacement_bundle: role startup recipes plus just gov-check
role startup recipes plus just gov-check

surfaces.replacement_bundle: role startup recipes plus just gov-check
